findings.title: Command injection via system() in ping
findings.description: User-supplied host argument from argv embedded into snprintf and passed to system() without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via system() in DNS lookup
findings.description: Domain argument embedded into dig command via snprintf and system() while only record type is validated

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search
findings.description: Three user-controlled parameters interpolated into tail|grep shell pipeline via snprintf with insufficient quoting

findings.title: Command injection via system() in disk info
findings.description: User-supplied path argument from argv embedded into df command via snprintf and system()

findings.title: Command injection via system() in archive
findings.description: Filepath argument embedded into tar command via snprintf and system() while only archive name is sanitized

findings.title: Command injection via system() in port check
findings.description: Host argument from argv embedded into nc command via snprintf and system() while only port is validated

findings.title: Arbitrary command execution in interactive mode
findings.description: User input from stdin passed directly to system() via snprintf with no command filtering or access control
